chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِنْبَرِ وَ الرَّوْضَةِ وَ مَقَامِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 217 – The Pulpit, and the garden, and place of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/268)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/268)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) صَلَاةٌ فِي مَسْجِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) تَعْدِلُ بِعَشَرَةِ آلَافِ صَلَاةٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Abu Ismail Al Sarraj, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Al Saamit who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘A Salaat prayed in the Masjid of the Prophetsaww equates with ten thousand Salaats’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Isma‘il al-Sarraj from ibn Muskan from abu al-Samit who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Performing salat (prayer) in the Masjid of the Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, is equal to ten thousand salat (prayer).”’
